name: Sloppy Franks
recipeIngredient: 1 T Butter Or Margarine               1/2 cup Barbecue sauce
1/4 cup Catsup				   1 lb Franks, Cut Into 1/4-in. Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave onion, green pepper, and margarine in a 1-quart casserole on high (100%) until vegetables are tender, 3 to 4 minutes.
2. Stir in barbecue sauce, catsup, and franks. Cover and microwave on high (100%), 2 1/2 minutes, stirring.
3. Cover and microwave until mixture boils, 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Spoon mixture onto buns on serving plate. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until buns are hot, 1 to 2 minutes.
